route.name: 2026 Tour de France reference route
route.notes: distance/type/start/finish are official. The official page publishes 3,320.7km while its 21 listed stage distances sum to 3,289.8km; both are retained. elevationGainM, gradients, wind and profiles are game-model allocations constrained to the official 53,950m total.

coursePoints.name: Tour de France 2026 official course classification checkpoints
coursePoints.notes: Intermediate sprint, KOM and stage-finish green-jersey schedules transcribed from the official stage pages. Stage 1 team time trial has no points checkpoint table.
